a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Week by week change in confirmed COVID-19 cases, Mar 2, 2025
The weekly change on any given date measures the percentage change in the number of new confirmed cases
over the last seven days relative to the number in the previous seven days. Due to limited testing, the number
of confirmed cases is lower than the true number of infections.
